questions.question: You mentioned reducing recruiter review time by 42%. What design decisions made that outcome possible?
questions.criterion: deliver trustworthy candidate ranking with evidence
questions.evidence_reference: Built a resume-screening workflow that reduced recruiter review time by 42%

questions.question: Walk us through your fallback parsing architecture for mixed resume formats.
questions.criterion: ability to design robust data workflows with fallback handling
questions.evidence_reference: Implemented fallback parsing across PDF and DOCX with confidence scoring
